general_description: Appearance, shortcuts, and global behavior for the app.
appearance_description: Choose how openNotes looks across the entire workspace.
language_description: Choose the display language for the entire app.
shortcuts_description: Assign separate global hotkeys for start/stop and pause/resume.
shortcuts_hint: Click a field to capture a new keyboard combination. Press Escape to cancel.
shortcuts_errorUpdate: Unable to update {{target}} shortcut. Previous shortcut restored.
shortcuts_errorRestore: Unable to update or restore {{target}} shortcut. Restart the app.
reset_description: Reset every preference to defaults, including theme, shortcuts, models, and storage behavior.
reset_confirm: Reset all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone.
recording_description: Set default capture devices and audio source behavior for new sessions.
mic_description: Choose a preferred input device, or keep system default fallback.
mic_hint: Device preference applies to newly started recordings.
mic_error: Unable to list microphone devices. Using system default.
audioSource_description: Pick what openNotes captures when a recording starts.
audioSource_hint: Maximum recording duration remains capped at 4 hours.
transcription_description: Manage local Whisper model availability. Recording language is auto-detected.
transModel_description: {{model}} runs fully local and powers transcript generation.
transModel_errorCheck: Unable to check transcription model status.
summary_description: Control generation mode and local Ollama model management.
ollamaModel_description: Pick which installed model generates post-meeting summaries.
ollamaModel_noModels: No models found. Ensure Ollama is running, then pull a model below.
autoSummary_description: Choose whether summaries generate automatically after recording.
summaryLanguage_description: Choose what language summaries are generated in.
ollama_errorLoad: Unable to load Ollama status. Check server URL and connectivity.
ollama_pullError: Unable to pull model. Ensure Ollama is reachable and retry.
ollama_catalogError: Unable to load downloadable Ollama model catalog. Check your internet connection and retry.
ollama_catalogEmpty: Could not load downloadable models. Refresh the catalog and try again.
data_description: Storage location, backups, and recovery controls.
storagePath_description: All recordings, transcripts, and summaries are stored locally here.
dataManagement_description: Backup your complete library or restore from a previous archive.
dataManagement_restoreWarning: Restoring replaces all current data and cannot be undone.
dataManagement_confirmRestore: This will replace your current library data. Are you sure? The app will need to restart after restore.
dataManagement_restoreSuccess: Restore complete. Please restart openNotes to use the restored data.
about_tagline: One-click meeting recording with structured, actionable notes, fully local and fully free.
updates_unavailable: Automatic updates are unavailable in this build.
